description: Qdrant is a vector database and similarity search engine used to store, index, and query dense and sparse vector data for search, recommendation, and retrieval workloads. It is available as open-source software and as managed cloud offerings.
summary: Qdrant exposes a REST API for its vector database, an official Qdrant Cloud CLI, and an official MCP server package for connecting LLM clients to Qdrant-backed memory.
